name: Sprunki Master
description: Sprunki Master is an exciting Stickman Music game inspired by the popular music-mixing game Incredibox. It builds on the original games creative foundation with fresh soundscapes, visuals, and interactive elements. Created by VodoGame, Sprunki Master introduces new characters, beats, rhythms, and melodies, offering music lovers and gamers a vibrant platform to explore their creativity.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
